name: agent-harness-generator
description: Scaffold your own focused AI agent harness — Claude Code, Codex, pi.dev, Hermes, OpenClaw, or RVM. WASM kernel (Rust → wasm-bindgen + NAPI-RS), 6 hosts, witness-signed releases, GCP Secret Manager validation.

commands.name: create-harness
commands.description: Scaffold a new AI agent harness in the current directory

commands.name: publish-harness
commands.description: Smoke-test + witness-sign + npm publish for a generated harness

commands.name: validate-harness
commands.description: Release-readiness umbrella: doctor + verify + path-guard + mcp + secrets

commands.name: harness-secrets
commands.description: GCP Secret Manager helpers — check / fetch / validate-token

commands.name: verify-witness
commands.description: Verify the Ed25519 witness manifest of a scaffolded harness

commands.name: upgrade-harness
commands.description: Drift detection + apply against the latest generator template (--apply opt-in)

commands.name: diag-harness
commands.description: Kernel-version skew check (ADR-027). Surfaces manifest kernel + installed kernel + verdict with copy-pasteable next step. --json for CI gating; --bundle (iter 90) emits a full support-ticket JSON (sanitised manifest + deps + env).
